channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: 【used】Landscape / ARB-204/FL 2014 3.105kg #1404-006【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $2,492
item.description:
$2,492 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Landscape is a brand that creates guitars and basses inspired by classical instruments such as violins and cellos, based on the concept of organic instrument making.


This model is an acoustic bass that incorporates elements of an upright bass and cello.


The body is constructed with a spruce top and maple sides and back.


The neck is made of 3-piece maple, and the fingerboard is ebony.


The bridge and tailpiece are also made of ebony.


It features an original magnetic pickup at the end of the fingerboard and a Fishman bridge-type piezo pickup.


These can be freely combined to create a wide range of sounds.


The combination of the airy magnetic pickup and the hard piezo pickup offers a wide range of tones, which is a major attraction.


This is a good match for those looking for a highly practical acoustic bass for live performances and recording.


The truss rod is in good condition.


The neck is in good condition.


The body and paintwork have a few paint chips on the side of the body. Otherwise, it is in relatively good condition.


The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were observed.


Controls: Magnetic PU Volume, Piezo PU Volume, Tone

Nut Width: 42.7mm

Bridge String Spacing: 17.0mm

Scale Length: 34 Inch

Year of Manufacture: 2014

Country of Manufacture: JAPAN


GIB craftsmen will adjust the instrument for easy playability before delivery.


Accessories: Hard Case


Text: Tomoki Hayakawa


Inspection 담당: Matsunaga


Product Photos: Miura


GIB 3-Month Warranty Included


◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information


●Lifetime Free Maintenance


Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free ""String Vibration Setup"" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)


・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.


・This warranty is only valid for the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.


*Please note that you will be responsible for shipping and other related expenses.


*Repurchase Price Guarantee


If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the repurchase price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.


*Defect Warranty


Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.


The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.


Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:


* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.


* Replacement of consumables.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.


* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.


* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the text has been altered.


* If the warranty card is not presented or is lost.


(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan.)


● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in


When you purchase an instrument, you will receive a 10% discount on the sales price when you use our trade-in service. (Consignment items are excluded. This discount applies only if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the sales price.)


Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.


We ship with sufficient packaging.


We also ship internationally.



●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee

Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.


If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.


Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.

Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using

item.title: Travel-Bass ACG Krell A Type Headless 6 2019 - Green — $4,032.50
item.description:
$4,032.50 · Very Good · Thomas

Professional Bass without any compromise.

item.title: 【used】Xotic / XJ-1T 5st VWH 4.745kg #J-1081【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $2,962
item.description:
$2,962 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Xotic is a brand founded in LA by Japanese builder Hiro Miura.

In Japan, it's used by many famous musicians, including Yoshiki Takahashi, BJ from indigo jam unit, and Katsushi Morioka. Internationally, it's used by Chuck Rainey, Rhonda Smith, Travis Carlton, and many others. (Titles omitted)

The XJ series, a line manufactured in Japan, has been highly regarded, especially among studio workers.

While fundamentally built in the Fender style, it incorporates several modern updates.

For example, the neck joint position is slightly different from the usual, and you'll notice that it makes it easier to reach the higher positions with your left hand.

This is an arrangement for modern musicians who utilize the entire fretboard evenly.

The body is alder, and the fretboard is rosewood.

It's a classic configuration with a rich midrange.

The older logo design suggests it's a slightly older instrument.

The pickups are Xotic JB 5-string set.

The preamp is Trilogic.

The sound is refined, providing ample bass while incorporating pleasant harmonics.

Playability is also very high, making it a high-level instrument overall.

There's always a demand for a JB bass that combines modern playability and preamp features with a traditional sound, especially among session and studio musicians.

However, few products meet this demand in terms of quality.

I believe the Xotic XJ is one of the best solutions to meet that demand.

The frets have approximately 70% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork are in very clean condition with no noticeable scratches.

The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were observed.

Controls: Neck pickup volume (push-pull / active-passive), bridge pickup volume (push-pull / series-parallel), master tone, treble, middle, bass, middle frequency selector switch
Nut width: 47.2mm
String spacing at bridge: 19.0mm
Scale: 34 inches
Year of manufacture: Unknown
Country of manufacture: JAPAN

During setup, we use our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.

These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Please enjoy these strings, which aim to be a new standard for bassists.

Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: Original gig bag

Text: Tomoki Hayakawa

Inspection 담당: Matsunaga

Product Photos: Higashie

GIB 3-Month Warranty Included

◯GIB and TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

●Re-Buyback Price Guarantee

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

●Defect Warranty

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. With the exception of some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used products and 1 year for new products.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by a party other than our company.

* If the warranty certificate does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the wording has been altered.

* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only provided for purchases made in Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When you use our trade-in service at the time of purchase, the sales price will be 10% off. (Consignment items are excluded. This offer is only applicable if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the selling price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We will ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Henry's Cats MB-4 Kate Mini Bass – Satin Black — $461.36
item.description:
$461.36 · Brand New · GUITAR GEAR

Henry's Cats MB-4 Kate Mini Bass – Satin Black

Compact, powerful, and incredibly easy to play, the Henry's Cats MB-4 Kate is a short-scale electric bass designed for both bassists and guitarists who appreciate a familiar and comfortable playing experience.

Key Features:

  • Perfect for bassists and guitarists thanks to its familiar feel
  • Short-scale design (756 mm / 29.75") for enhanced comfort and playability
  • Lightweight poplar body, ideal for long rehearsals, studio sessions, and live performances
  • Roasted maple neck and fingerboard for excellent stability, smooth playability, and resistance to climate changes
  • 19 jumbo stainless steel frets for superior durability and precise intonation
  • Passive ME-OW4 humbucker pickup delivering a warm, articulate, noise-free tone
  • Bone nut
  • Distinctive Henry's reverse headstock
  • Elegant satin finish that resists fingerprints and feels smooth to the touch
  • Satin Black finish

Condition:

The instrument is professionally inspected, adjusted, and fully set up in our shop before shipping, ensuring a comfortable playing experience right out of the box and ready to perform.

item.title: 【used】YAMAHA / SBV-500 Shelby Blue 2000-2006 3.670kg #QK24223【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,740
item.description:
$1,740 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Yamaha is a renowned brand that has supported the Japanese guitar industry since its early days.

Countless top artists, including Nathan East, John Patitucci, and Billy Sheehan, use Yamaha basses. (Titles omitted)

The brand boasts many iconic models, such as the BB and TRB series, all highly regarded and beloved by top professionals.

This is the SBV-500, developed based on the older SB series.

With its uniquely cute appearance and surprisingly robust sound, it remains a popular model even after production has ceased.

The body is made of alder, and the fingerboard is rosewood.

This is a classic combination, resulting in a rich midrange.

The pickups are original.

The controls are a simple 2-volume, 1-tone setup.

While maintaining Yamaha's characteristic tight sound as a foundation, it features a punchy attack thanks to the original pickups.

The edgy feel, especially when driven, is very pleasing, and it fits very well into pick-played rock ensembles.

This is a guitar that combines a unique look with excellent sound at a high level.

Fret life is approximately 90%.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork show fine scratches all over. There is a dent on the back of the body.

The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were found.

Controls: Neck pickup volume, bridge pickup volume, tone
Nut width: 40.0mm
Bridge string spacing: 19.0mm
Scale: 34 inches
Year of manufacture: 2000-2006
Country of manufacture: TAIWAN

During setup, we used our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.

Characterized by its straightforward sound and stable playability, these strings naturally bring out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Please enjoy these strings, aiming to be a new standard for bassists.

They are delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: Soft case

Text: Mizuki Ishikawa

Inspection 담당: Oshima

Product photos: Tei

GIB 3-month warranty included

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

● Guaranteed Buyback Price

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee a buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

● Warranty Against Defects

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.

* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in. Or, if the wording has been altered.

* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When you purchase an item, you will receive a 10% discount on the sales price when you use our trade-in service. (Consignment items are excluded. This discount applies only if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the sales price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 1977 - Sunburse — $3,795.29
item.description:
$3,795.29 · Very Good · Thomas

Very good Bass, 4,9kg

item.title: Warwick Streamer LX with Custom Shop Options 2011 - Natural — $2,431.36
item.description:
$2,431.36 · Excellent · DelcShop Music

I am selling my Warwick Streamer LX, crafted in Markneukirchen, Germany, in August 2011 (Serial Number: H15718911).

This is an exceptional instrument that combines the legendary versatility of the Streamer with high-end specs that are nowadays only found on the Masterbuilt series.

Technical Specifications:

Origin: Made in Germany

Body: Flamed Maple – stunning grain and figure.

Neck: Bolt-on Ovangkol.

Fretboard: Wenge, delivering that signature Warwick "growl."

Electronics: Active MEC P/J pickups with an active 2-band MEC preamp (Volume, Balance, Bass, Treble).

Premium Options:

Luminlays: Phosphorescent side dots (perfect for low-light stage visibility).

Solid Brass Just-A-Nut III: The must-have upgrade for maximum sustain and ultra-precise action adjustment (often replaced by plastic nuts on standard models).

Frets: Bell Bronze – extremely durable and resonant.

Condition:

The bass is in excellent condition and has been meticulously maintained. The action is low, the neck is perfectly straight, and the electronics are dead quiet (no hiss or crackling).

item.title: Schecter Jazz Bass Serie A 80' - Translucide red — $1,755.32
item.description:
$1,755.32 · Very Good · Groove'N'Gear

Beautiful Jazz Bass built by Schecter in the USA during the 1980s. Most likely a model from the brand's Custom Shop.

Back then, brands such as Schecter, Jackson, and Charvel were serious competitors to Fender, to the point of producing instruments that often surpassed the historic brand in terms of quality.

This particular Jazz Bass features an ash body finished in a beautiful transparent red lacquer that showcases the attractive grain of the wood. The maple neck is equally impressive, as is the rosewood fingerboard.

The original bridge has been replaced with a Badass Bass II, which performs exceptionally well, providing excellent sustain and highly precise adjustment options.

The MonsterTone pickups deliver a very pleasing tone: growly and aggressive when needed, bright and snappy for slap playing, with plenty of bite when the tone control is fully open, and noticeably smoother when rolled off. Overall, it sits firmly in the Marcus Miller-style Jazz Bass territory. As expected from any respectable Jazz Bass, this is an extremely versatile instrument.

The overall condition is very good. There are a few minor dings and scratches from normal use, but nothing particularly noticeable.

Playability is excellent, with a low action and a very comfortable feel. Weight is approximately 4.9 kg (10.8 lbs). It is on the heavier side, but it looks fantastic and sounds great.

The bass comes with a beautiful period-correct flight case featuring an orange-yellow tweed covering.

item.title: Fernandes FAB-180 1980 Alembic style Bass Made in Japan — $3,068
item.description:
$3,068 · Very Good · Tokyo Tone Temple

Fernandes FAB-180 — 1980, Made in Japan (Alembic style Active Bass)

A rare and historically interesting instrument from Fernandes' early-1980s flagship line. The FAB-180 is widely regarded as an Alembic Series I–style bass, with an active tone circuit closely modeled on the Alembic Series I. Because of the legal dispute between Alembic and Japanese makers at the time, this model was discontinued, making surviving examples increasingly hard to find.

Specifications

  • Year: 1980, Made in Japan
  • Body: Zebrawood top and back with a Silverheart center
  • Neck: 5-piece through-neck (mahogany/maple), rosewood fingerboard
  • Scale: 32" (medium scale)
  • Pickups: Two single-coil pickups with a hum-cancelling pickup positioned between them
  • Controls: 2 Volume, 2 Tone, 3-Way Q Switch, PU Selector (Mute / Rear / Mix / Front)

Condition
This bass is in very good condition and retains excellent playability. There are some minor surface scratches and dents from normal use, but nothing that affects playing. Fret life is plentiful, and all electronics function exactly as expected.

Please note the following points in the interest of full transparency:

  • A portion of the metal on the battery snap is chipped. However, it sits inside the battery compartment box within the body, so this has no effect on operation.
  • The protruding tail section of the body has been trimmed/cut, and the bridge has been lowered by approximately 1/5 inch. These are the only notable modifications.

Electronics & Power Supply
The electronics operate fully as originally designed. When connected with a mono (TS) phone plug, only the front pickup is active. By using a stereo (TRS) phone plug, the rear pickup output becomes available as well.

The original PS-5 power supply is not included. In its place, we include a power supply that performs exactly the same function as the PS-5 and requires XLR cable. The original PS-5 required AC 100V, whereas this unit runs on a standard 9V DC input the same type used by common guitar/bass effects pedals. As with the original, using the power supply means no onboard battery is required, and it allows you to mix or separately output the front and rear pickups.

Weight: 4.7 kg (10 lb 6 oz)
Case: Not included

Detailed photos and a video are available. A YouTube video is also posted showing the guitar's condition up close. Please check everything carefully before making your decision. Feel free to reach out with any questions — we're always happy to help.

We offer expedited shipping at an additional cost, which is significantly faster than the standard free shipping option. If you're interested, please feel free to contact us before or after your purchase.

Returns are only accepted if the item's condition differs from the description. In such cases, please contact us within 3 days of receiving the item.

Please be sure to review all of our shop policies here: https://reverb.com/shop/tokyotonetemple/about

item.title: Sterling by Music Man Short Scale StingRay RAYSS4 - Daphne Blue - 2nd Hand — $831.31
item.description:
$831.31 · Very Good · Rich Tone Music

Sterling by Music Man Short Scale StingRay RAYSS4 - Daphne Blue - 2nd Hand Details:

  • Case/Box: None
  • Overall Condition: Very Good
  • Serial: SR66580
  • Weight: 7LB 6oz

This is a previously loved item and as such may have signs of use. Please note that whilst we do our best to picture our 2nd hand and Ex demo items in detail it is not always possible to picture all marks, scratches, and blemishes on these items. This may be due to the reflective nature of the item or the finish. We do try to give a broad indication of the general condition in the description, but this is just a guide. If you are looking for something in extremely good condition it is advised to call for a detailed talk through of the item before ordering.

If you have any questions about this item or would like to know more about it, please feel free to contact us with any specific questions and a member of our sales staff will get back to you straight away.

Sell Your Gear

As well as buying 2nd Hand items for cash we are also happy to take items as part exchange against all New, Ex Demo or 2nd hand. So, if you have anything to part exchange then please feel free to contact us through the "sell your gear" link above or email us and we will come back with a quote.

Please Note

This is a 2nd hand item and may not come with all originally included items, original components, or original accessories. Hi-tech items may also not include its original software. Please refer to the pictures and notes above for included items.

All our 2nd hand items are fully checked and setup in advance of shipping. We package very well and usually ship next working day unless the item is marked Collection Only. If the item is marked as Collection Only you can still reserve with a deposit using our reserve and collect facility at checkout or by contacting us.

item.title: Sterling by Music Man S.U.B. StingRay 4 - Vintage Sunburst Satin - 2nd Hand — $528.51
item.description:
$528.51 · Good · Rich Tone Music

Sterling by Music Man S.U.B. StingRay 4 - Vintage Sunburst Satin - 2nd Hand Details:

This is a previously loved item and as such may have signs of use. If you have any questions about this item or would like to know more about it, please feel free to contact us with any specific questions and a member of our sales staff will get back to you straight away.

Sell Your Gear

As well as buying 2nd Hand items for cash we are also happy to take items as part exchange against all New, Ex Demo or 2nd hand. So, if you have anything to part exchange then please feel free to contact us through the "sell your gear" link above or email us and we will come back with a quote.

Please Note

This is a 2nd hand item and may not come with all originally included items, original components, or original accessories. Hi-tech items may also not include its original software. Please refer to the pictures and notes above for included items.

All our 2nd hand items are fully checked and setup in advance of shipping. We package very well and usually ship next working day unless the item is marked Collection Only. If the item is marked as Collection Only you can still reserve with a deposit using our reserve and collect facility at checkout or by contacting us.

item.title: Sago Classic Style J4 Custom -Tabuchi Mk-II- 2026 [UNISON SQUARE GARDEN][Made in Japan] — $2,974.42
item.description:
$2,974.42 · Brand New · Kurosawa Music Machida - Japan

Buy with confidence from a trusted Japanese music store!

Kurosawa Music was established in 1957 and has long served as the official distributor of Martin guitars in Japan. We are one of the largest and most respected musical instrument retailers in the country.

Our Machida branch alone has shipped hundreds of guitars and basses to over 50 countries, including the United States, Europe, and across Asia.
Every item is carefully inspected, professionally packed, and shipped with full insurance coverage for your peace of mind.

We are committed to providing safe, reliable service and quality instruments to musicians around the world.
Feel free to contact us anytime with questions — we’re happy to help.

*Caution!!
We do not accept guest checkout of PayPal payment.
Please create your PayPal account before make the payment.

Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask for more details.

Also, please carefully read our shop policy below the guitar description! 


----------------------------------
Body : Alder 2P
Neck : Hard Maple
Finger Board : Richlite
Tuner : Gotoh GB528
Nut : Brass
Radius : 255mm
Scale : 864mm(21F)
Neck PU : Nordstrand Big Single
Bridge PU : Nordstrand Big Single
Bridge : JB Spiral
Control : 1Vol+1Tone
Pickguard : Vintage White 3P
Color : Transparent Akane
Finish : Urethane Gloss

Weight : 4.06kg / 8.95lbs

With Gig Bag
----------------------------------


Please contact us if you have any questions.
*Notice-

As this product is being sold in retail stores alongside online stores, there is a possibility that it may be sold out.
Please kindly cancel the order if this happens.

Customs Tax

International Buyers Please Note:
Import duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost. These charges are the buyer's responsibility.
Please check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to bidding or buying.
Customs fees are normally charged by the shipping company or collected when you pick the item up. These fees are not additional shipping charges.
We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms. Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.

Shipping
We only ship to PayPal registered address.
Service: EMS or FedEx
Tracking URL: Japan Post, FedEx

Please Note:
We won't under-value merchandise or mark the item as a gift on customs forms.　Doing that is against U.S. and international laws.
We only ship to PayPal registered address.
Please contact us if you reside in countries in which we do not specify shipping service and cost.
Please be aware that delivery could be delayed depending on customs inspection, in case of natural disasters, and other reasons such as postal strikes.

Payment
We only Accept PayPal.
The item will be shipped within 4 business day after the payment is received.
If payment can't be confirmed within 4 days after the close of the auction, a reminder will be sent to you.

Return Policy
Returns accepted
After receiving the item, contact seller within 3 days.
Please see more details on Shipping and payments tab.

Others
If you have any problem, please contact us. Your satisfaction is important to us.

About Authenticity
All our items are 100% authentic.
We are officially registered as legal business and we have to comply with all rules and　regulations including tax requirements from the Japanese government.

About Us

Kurosawa Music Machida
Business hours: 11:00am-8:00pm
(Web order and e-mail are available 24/7.)

T.KUROSAWA & CO.,LTD. 

Machida modi 7F
6-2-6, Haramachida
Machida-shi, Tokyo 194-0013 Japan

item.title: 【new】moon / JB-4A BM/E CR 4.555kg #59210【GIB Hyogo】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $3,526
item.description:
$3,526 · Excellent · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Moon is a leading, long-established guitar brand in Japan.

Highly regarded by many professional artists, Moon basses are known to be the favorites of many professionals, including Mitsuru Sudo and Larry Graham. (Titles omitted)

This is a JB-4A ordered from GIB.

It's a JB model equipped with their signature active circuitry.

The body is made of alder, and the fingerboard is ebony, a wood combination typical of Moon.

The color is Burgundy Mist, a signature GIB finish.

The pickups are Oxalis JB, and the preamp is a Bartolini XTCT.

As expected from Moon, it offers excellent playability and a crisp, clear sound.

The high quality in these aspects is a major appeal of Moon.

A masterpiece from a leading Japanese brand.

Highly recommended.

SPECS

Body: Alder
Neck: Maple
Fingerboard: Ebony
Pickups: OX-JB & XTCT
Parts: Chrome
Color: Burgundy Mist

GIB's craftsmen will adjust the guitar for optimal playability before delivery.

Accessories: Warranty card, 2 types of hex wrenches

Text: Ryoma Terao

Inspector: Ishikawa

Product photos: Wakatsuki

Manufacturer's warranty included

(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan)

Shipped in a sturdy cardboard box.

International shipping is available.

item will be packed with a hard cardboard box.
we do ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Eko BX-7 fretless 1980s - natural — $889.52
item.description:
$889.52 · Good · Wolfram's Gear Garage

No cracks or major flaws. Pickups are working. The pots need attention. One knob is broken off.

item.title: Bacchus Handmade Standard-4 Black Oil 2004 — $1,078.57
item.description:
$1,078.57 · Very Good · Topshelf Instruments

Bacchus Standard-4, black oil, made in Japan 2004. We love Bacchus basses around here, they're such great instruments. Bacchus kicked off in 1998, under the Deviser Co umbrella, offering vintage-style models, made completely by hand to the local Japan market. This one is a mid-00s Handmade series, so these were pretty high end in their day; with a list price of ¥189000, this cost around triple the asking price for a normal Fender Japan Jazz Bass. That means you get super classy woodwork: amazing ash for the body, super tight maple and some excellent ebony for the neck, all dialed and finished to a very high standard. It's very enjoyable to play: the neck is quick, it balances nicely, and the natural resonance and responsiveness is exemplary. The black oil finish has faded and rubbed around the edges like a favourite pair of jeans; it looks super cool. The tone is Jazz Bass-ish, but with a modern twist via the active preamp: clear, fat, articulate, growly, immediate. This is a a brilliant bass, it delivers the goods. 

Model: Bacchus Handmade Standard-4
Made: Japan, 2005, Aska workshop
Serial: 130358
Finish: black oil
Body: lightweight ash
Neck: maple, ebony fretboard, 34" scale, 38mm nut, 12" radius, slim C to D shape
Weight: 4.520kg
Mods: none
Pickups: Bacchus JB-ALV single coil x2, Bartolini XTCT active preamp
Accessories: basic Bacchus gig bag

Cosmetic condition notes: minor finish wear. The headstock has dimples on the end and bottom edge. The is clean and smooth in the hands, minor dimples and rub wear on the back only. The back has rub wear on the horns, scuffs along the belly carve, back edge and elbow area and some rub wear on the bottom edge. The sides have dimples and rub wear around the whole body, no major marks. The front has a bald patch above the bridge pickup, scuffs around the knobs, dimples along the back edge, rub wear in the elbow area and some play wear on the guard and horns.
Overall: very good condition (7.5/10)

Playing Condition Notes: Action is low, neck is straight, intonation is good, truss rod works. All electronics tested and working properly. Wearing fresh 45/105 Moonshiners strings.
Fret Life: 8/10, minor wear only

item.title: 1987 Fender Jazz Bass 62 Reissue Lefty black — $1,779.04
item.description:
$1,779.04 · Very Good · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

1987 Fender Jazz Bass 62 Reissue Lefty, black. Made in Japan, serial number E796104. This bass is all original, except for some pickguard screws. It shows some wear, but it has excellent frets and was freshly serviced and setup. Rare Fuji Gen made left handed bass. Weighs 4.35kg.

item.title: 2004 Fender Jazz Bass '62 Reissue fiesta red — $1,660.44
item.description:
$1,660.44 · Very Good · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

Ca. 2004 Fender Jazz Bass '62 Reissue, fiesta red. Crafted in Japan, serial number R002734. This bass is 100% original except for one strap button and a set of EMG-X pickups with its electronics. Very rare left handed edition. Weighs 4.35kg.

item.title: 2008 Fender Precision Bass '51 Reissue sunburst — $1,998.46
item.description:
$1,998.46 · Excellent · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

Ca. 2008 Fender Precision Bass '51 Reissue, sunburst. Crafted in Japan, serial number S083250. This bass is 100% original and was very well taken care of. Model OPB51-SD, with factory installed Seymour Duncan pickups and a gorgeous and fairly light ash body make this a winner. Weighs 4.2kg.

item.title: 1990 Fender Precision Bass 62 Reissue Lefty sunburst — $1,512.19
item.description:
$1,512.19 · Very Good · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

1990 Fender Precision Bass 62 Reissue Lefty, sunburst. Made in Japan, serial number J032822. This bass is all original, except for one tuner bushing, two bridge saddles and the strap buttons. Features an upgraded tone cap. Lots of wear, excellent frets. Weighs 4.05kg.

item.title: 2010s Aria Diamond Bass DMB-380 candy apple red — $652.32
item.description:
$652.32 · Excellent · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

Ca. 2010s Aria Diamond Bass DMB-380, candy apple red. Made in China. This bass is all original and it's in excellent condition. Rad take on a Mosrite shaped bass with a Jazz Bass pickup configuration. Weighs 4.6kg.

item.title: 1991 Fender American Vintage '62 Reissue Precision Bass sunburst — $2,846.47
item.description:
$2,846.47 · Very Good · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

1991 Fender American Vintage '62 Reissue Precision Bass, sunburst. Made in USA, serial number V050035. This bass is 100% original, except for the finger rest. It shows wear mostly on the back of the body. Excellent frets, freshly setup and it comes with a hardshell case. Weighs 4.3kg.

item.title: 1974 Fender Precision Bass, mocha brown ultra lightweight — $4,922.02
item.description:
$4,922.02 · Good · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

1974 Fender Precision Bass, mocha brown. Made in USA, serial number 537997. This bass is mostly original, but the electronics (CTS pots, tone cap, wiring), 1 tuner screw and washer and the thumb rest. There's an extra strap button hole. The bass shows a lot of wear and some heavy case or guitar stand burn on the body. Freshly serviced, excellent frets. Weighs only 3.9kg!

item.title: 1960s Guyatone EB-8 Bass red sunburst — $1,304.63
item.description:
$1,304.63 · Very Good · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

Ca. early 1960s Guyatone EB-8 Bass, red sunburst. Made in Japan. This bass is 100% original, except for the tuners. Very rare 34" scale 'bizarre' bass, freshly serviced and with one great sounding pickup. It's old enough to not have a truss rod, however it plays comfortably fine with medium action. Weighs 4.7kg.

item.title: 2002 Fender Jazz Bass '62 Reissue surf green — $1,482.54
item.description:
$1,482.54 · Excellent · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

Ca. 2002 Fender Jazz Bass '62 Reissue, surf green. Crafted in Japan, serial number P087302. This bass is 100% original and in excellent condition. Rare color. Weighs 4.2kg.

item.title: 1975 Fender Jazz Bass violet burst — $2,846.47
item.description:
$2,846.47 · Good · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

1975 Fender Jazz Bass, violet burst. Made in USA, serial number 679391. This bass was oversprayed in a violet burst color and at the same time, the neck was painted in the same color (and then removed, as evidenced by the faint headstock logo). The electronics, bridge, knobs, pickguard and most screws were replaced and the tuners were upgraded to Gotoh Res-O-Lite (many other sets of tuners were mounted prior as evidenced by the many extra screw holes). There are a few repairs from stress cracks. The pickups are original (the neck pickup was rewound) and despite its cosmetic shortcomings, this bass is a great playing and sounding instrument. Weighs 4.2kg.

item.title: 2013 Gibson Thunderbird Bass IV ebony — $2,609.26
item.description:
$2,609.26 · Very Good · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

2013 Gibson Thunderbird IV ebony. Made in USA, serial number 101530453. This bass is all original, except for a few redone solder joints. Comes with its original Gibson hardshell case and pre-pack checklist with matching serial number. Shows light wear overall, some dings on the bottom of the body and headstock, nothing crazy. Feels light and is nicely balanced. Weighs 3.85kg.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass Special Contemporary PJM-65R Black 1984-1987 Made in Japan — $1,303.44
item.description:
$1,303.44 · Very Good · bassNguitar

Introduced in 1960, the Jazz Bass quickly established itself as the benchmark on the market. This Special model moves away from the original design, as the shape has been modernized and the neck pickup has been borrowed from the Precision Bass, giving this J-Bass great versatility. It also features the exemplary craftsmanship, assembly quality, and finish typical of Japanese production. The body is made of alder, paired with a maple neck fitted with a rosewood fingerboard with a 12-inch radius. Sold with a gig bag.


More pix and details upon request.

Shipping worldwide available.

item.title: 1968 Guyatone EB-9 Sharp 5 Bass metallic blue — $1,482.54
item.description:
$1,482.54 · Very Good · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

Ca. 1968 Guyatone EB-9, metallic blue. Made in Japan. This bass is all original, except for the switch tip and the missing bridge cover. Comes with its original hardshell case (two broken latches, supplied with security strap). Weighs 4.2kg.

item.title: 2006 Fender Jazz Bass American Vintage '62 Reissue lake placid blue — $2,253.45
item.description:
$2,253.45 · Very Good · Yeahman's Vintage & Used Guitars

2006 Fender Jazz Bass American Vintage '62 Reissue, lake placid blue. Made in USA, serial number V158794. This bass is all original, except for the finger rest. It shows heavy lacquer checking in the body cutaways and around the neck pockets. Luckily, it is cosmetically only. The bass is otherwise in fine condition with excellent frets and freshly setup. Rare color, has nicely yellowed as well. Weighs 4.3kg.

item.title: Cort ACTION V-DLX 5-String Bass Guitar — $303.01
item.description:
$303.01 · Excellent · Sinno's Gear Shop

The Cort Action V-DLX is a versatile 5-string bass that combines modern active electronics, flexible pickups, and comfortable playability—making it a strong choice for players exploring extended-range bass without spending big.


  • Construction: Bolt-On
  • Body Material: Ash
  • Scale Length: 34″ (864mm)
  • Neck Material: Hard Maple
  • Fingerboard Material: Jatoba
  • Fingerboard Radius: 15.75″ (R400)
  • Number of Frets: 24 Frets
  • Inlay: White Dots
  • Pickups: Cort® PDX Soapbar Pickup Set
  • Electronics: Active 2-band EQ
  • Bridge: Cort® EB6(4)
  • Tuning Machines: Die-Cast
  • Hardware: Black / Chrome
  • Colors: Sunburst Flame Maple

This guitar shows light signs of use and wear including tiny pick scratches and marks on the paintwork, as shown in the above photos. The frets are in great condition with minimal wear and the pickups sound great.

Comes with hardshell case.

Can deliver to Melbourne CBD. Alternatively shipping can be arranged at buyers cost.

item.title: 【new】Sire / V7 Vin Ash-5 NT/HM 4.36kg #2N26560073【GIB Hyogo】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,704
item.description:
$1,704 · Excellent · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Sire became famous for releasing basses supervised by Marcus Miller. (Titles omitted)

The quality of their guitars and basses is extremely high, earning them high praise not only from Marcus Miller fans but also from a wider audience.

This is the latest model, the "New Generation" V7 Vintage Ash-5, modeled after a 1970s JB bass.

While a replica of a 1970s model, it incorporates modern features such as active circuitry, Luminlay construction, and lightweight hardware.

The body is made of Swamp Ash.

The neck is 34-inch scale Hard Maple, and the fingerboard is also Hard Maple. The black binding and block inlays evoke the distinctive style of the 1970s.

The fingerboard features an edgeless finish with rounded edges, making it suitable for players who prefer smooth fingering.

Most players will likely find this feature appealing.

The fingerboard radius is 7.25 inches, faithfully reproducing the vintage style.

This bass features a newly designed Marcus Vintage-J Revolution Pickup set.

It boasts a tight, trebly sound characteristic of 70s JB basses.

The preamp is a Marcus Heritage-3.

In the Vintage model, the mid-frequency range has been removed for more intuitive sound shaping.

The moderately scooped midrange, tight, low-end bass, and sharp, sparkling treble evoke Marcus Miller's playing style.

It is particularly well-suited for percussive slap techniques and 16th-note fingerstyle playing where attack is important.

This bass is perfect not only for classic styles like Marcus Miller's, but also for styles that want to control the wide range of a 5-string bass and the functionality of an active bass with a practical balance.

SPECIFICATION

-BODY-
Body Material: Swamp Ash
Body Shape: Marcus Miller Jazz Shape (New Gen)
Body Color: NT (Natural)

-NECK-
Neck Material: Hard Maple
Neck Shape: C-Shape (New Gen)
Scale: 34"
Fingerboard Material: Hard Maple with Edgeless™ (Rolled Fretboard Edges)
Fingerboard Radius: 7.25"
Frets: 2.0 mm Small, 20 Frets
String Nut: Bone Nut, 46mm Width
Inlay: BK Block
Binding: BK 1ply
Neck Joint: Four Bolt Steel Plate

-ERECTRONICS-
Pickup: Marcus Vintage-J Revolution Pickup set
Preamp: Marcus Heritage-3 (No-Mid Frequency)
Controls: Volume / Tone, Blender, Treble / Middle, Bass (P / P for Passive (Mode)
Knobs: Plastic J-bass Type in Black (New Gen)

-HARDWARE-
Bridge: Marcus Miller Vintage-S
Tuning Gear: Premium Light Weight Open Gear
Hardware Finish: Chrome
Pickguard: BK 3ply

-CASE-
Gig Bag

Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: Gig bag, warranty card, wrench, pickup fence

Text: Kaigo Kawami

Product Photos: Muragishi

Manufacturer's warranty included

(Warranty is only valid for purchases made in Japan)

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP D6715 Tracolla Jacquard Fleurs De Skull — $44.42
item.description:
$44.42 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

TRACOLLE Le Tracolle Jacquard sono realizzate in tessuto Jacquard confortevole e di alta qualità e presentano motivi vivaci e colorati progettati dai nostri artisti interni. Ogni Strap è testato per 200 libbre e ha estremità in vera pelle pensata per l'uso con o senza il sistema di fissaggio Straplok. Sei nuovi design sono aggiunti a questa serie di tracolle.

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP JH14 Jimi Hendrix Live in Maui Blue Diamonds Tracolla — $57.11
item.description:
$57.11 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

DUNLOP JH14 Jimi Hendrix Live in Maui Blue Diamonds Tracolla


Alla fine degli anni '60, Jimi Hendrix era nel centro musicale di una rivoluzione culturale. Dopo un nuovo decennio a Fillmore East, il 1° gennaio 1970, decise di tornare al blues. La performance di Jimi era insolitamente tranquilla, la sua testa china in profonda concentrazione, mentre la sua chitarra ululava e ruggiva con profondità viscerali ai ritmi del bassista Billy Cox e del batterista Buddy Miles. La sua versione magistrale di "Machine Gun" fu catturata quella notte affinchè le generazioni future sperimentassero il potere della musica come messaggio.
Caratteristiche

  • Tracolla realizzata con materiali, cuciture, fibbie di alta qualità

  • Larghezza: 5cm

  • Lunghezza: 84cm - 152cm

  • Tessitura: Jacquard vivace con motivi ispirati a Jimi

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP JH15 Jimi Hendrix Pop Festival — $57.11
item.description:
$57.11 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

DUNLOP JH15 Jimi Hendrix Pop Festival


Alla fine degli anni '60, Jimi Hendrix era nel centro musicale di una rivoluzione culturale. Dopo un nuovo decennio a Fillmore East, il 1° gennaio 1970, decise di tornare al blues. La performance di Jimi era insolitamente tranquilla, la sua testa china in profonda concentrazione, mentre la sua chitarra ululava e ruggiva con profondità viscerali ai ritmi del bassista Billy Cox e del batterista Buddy Miles. La sua versione magistrale di "Machine Gun" fu catturata quella notte affinchè le generazioni future sperimentassero il potere della musica come messaggio.
Caratteristiche

  • Larghezza: 5cm

  • Lunghezza: 84cm - 152cm

  • Tessitura: Jacquard vivace con motivi ispirati a Jimi

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP JH20 Jimi Hendrix Signature Leather — $105.33
item.description:
$105.33 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

DUNLOP JH20 Jimi Hendrix Signature Leather


Alla fine degli anni '60, Jimi Hendrix era nel centro musicale di una rivoluzione culturale. Dopo un nuovo decennio a Fillmore East, il 1° gennaio 1970, decise di tornare al blues. La performance di Jimi era insolitamente tranquilla, la sua testa china in profonda concentrazione, mentre la sua chitarra ululava e ruggiva con profondità viscerali ai ritmi del bassista Billy Cox e del batterista Buddy Miles.   • Larghezza: 5cm

  • Lunghezza: 84cm - 152cm

  • pelle

item.title: Fender Squier JV Jazz Bass 1983 White Fretless — $2,360.20
item.description:
$2,360.20 · Good · Jan Bass Collection

Squier JV Jazz Bass in awesome white finish.

These are now legendary basses, quite rightly!

They are of exceptional build quality and nail the 60's vibe. This bass is in good overall condition with a small shallow crack in the finish on the front of the body by the control plate and a few marks throughout.

Everything is in great working order and it plays like a dream!

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - JV54195
Colour - White
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood  - Alder
Neck Finish - Satin
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Rosewood
Frets - 20
Scale Length - 34"
Weight - 9lbs11oz/4.4kgs
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Fender

item.title: Fender Vintera II '60s Bass VI with Rosewood Fretboard - Fiesta Red — $1,066.24
item.description:
$1,066.24 · Excellent · Rob's Gear Garage

In absolutely like-new condition. Purchased for a studio project and barely used afterward. Professionally set up with a great low-action setup and upgraded with a Staytrem 7.25" bridge for significantly improved playability and tuning stability. Without this upgrade, the instrument was honestly difficult to play.

The Fender Vintera II '60s Bass VI faithfully recreates the iconic sound and style of the 1960s. This unique Bass VI combines the range of a bass with the feel of a guitar, delivering that unmistakable vintage "Beatles" sound.

Specifications:

  • Alder body
  • Maple neck with a comfortable mid-'60s C-shaped profile
  • Rosewood fingerboard with a 7.25" radius
  • Vintage tall frets
  • 3 vintage-style early-'60s single-coil pickups
  • Vintage floating tremolo with push-in arm
  • Vintage-style tuning machines
  • Professionally set up with a new Staytrem bridge (worth €120)
  • Includes a premium gig bag

It sounds fantastic and plays exactly as it should. A unique and inspiring Fender, perfect for the studio, live performance, or any collection.

The new price is considerably higher, especially when you factor in the Staytrem bridge upgrade. I'm offering it at a fair price because I'm thinning out my collection.

item.title: IYV SB100 P BASS 2025ish - Gloss Sunburst — $145
item.description:
$145 · Excellent · SAN Caddo gear

This P Bass is in open box , new condition with a flawless finish . It's a 4 string bass with a 34" scale length, a solid poplar body,rosewood neck, p style split single coil pickups, a hard tail bridge.

Open back chrome tuners.

Satin finished , unpainted neck and glossy sunburst body finish. Volume and tone controls, c n c wound single coils.

item.title: WARRIOR DRAN MICHAEL CUSTOM 5 2000 - Natural High Gloss Finish — $8,183.59
item.description:
$8,183.59 · Excellent · Miguel 's Gear Depot Bass

Traducción

* Warrior Dran Michael 5 neck-through.

* Serial number 00485 (probably late 1990s or early 2000s).

* Spalted maple top.

* Flame maple back.

* Laminated neck with Purpleheart.

* Ebony fingerboard.

* Bartolini pickups and preamp.

* Active/passive electronics.

* Gold-coloured hardware.

* Gold-coloured controls with abalone inlays.

* Warrior logo in abalone on the headstock and body.

* Full abalone binding on the headstock.

* Original Warrior case.

item.title: Line 6 Variax 700 Bass 2010s - Sunburst — $800
item.description:
$800 · Fair · Sizzle Studios

Needs a bit of a set up because it hasn’t been played in a while. It is missing the battery pack with the 6 AA batteries, but it still works with a 9 volt. Open to offers.
